description: Ordered sections for AIWG.md assembly. Each section is a standalone markdown fragment. The hook-regenerate command reads this manifest and concatenates sections (with optional filtering) to produce AIWG.md.

sections.title: AIWG SDLC Framework
sections.description: What AIWG is, installation path, .aiwg/ directory layout

sections.title: Core Platform Orchestrator Role
sections.description: Orchestration responsibilities, multi-agent workflow pattern, NL translations, available commands

sections.title: AIWG-Specific Rules
sections.description: Seven enforcement rules for artifact location, templates, orchestration, traceability

sections.title: Reference Documentation
sections.description: At-links to framework docs, orchestrator architecture, agent catalog

sections.title: AIWG Self-Maintenance
sections.description: CLI self-maintenance triggers, Steward agent, Mission Control, pre-flight checklist

sections.title: Phase Overview
sections.description: Inception, Elaboration, Construction, Transition, Production phase summaries

sections.title: Common Patterns
sections.description: Risk management, architecture evolution, security review, test execution patterns

sections.title: Troubleshooting
sections.description: Template not found, agent access denied, command not found, disabling context

sections.title: Resources
sections.description: Links to repo, framework docs, support channels
